series_metadata.series_description: Official Certifications issued by the Board of Elections showing the results of ongoing Local Option Elections. These certifications are used to determine the issuance of Liquor Permits in a particular area, as to WET or DRY status. (fna PM-207)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area ; Microform: a diazo copy in office area permanently. master microfilm in off-site storage permanently
